aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AEO with a clear service offering and contact information but lacks online reviews and detailed content to boost visibility.
quick_wins: Encourage satisfied customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search presence.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, customer testimonials, and location-specific keywords.
Implement a blog to regularly publish content related to HVAC services, maintenance tips, and industry trends.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes the business name, address, and phone number (NAP) but lacks consistency across the site and external platforms.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has basic NAP information but needs to ensure consistency and completeness across all online platforms to improve local SEO.
critical_issues: Inconsistent NAP information across the website and potential external platforms.
Lack of structured data for NAP information.
No presence on major local business directories.

nap_citations.summary: The business has NAP information on its website but needs to focus on building consistent citations across relevant directories and platforms.
action_items: Verify and update NAP information on the website to ensure consistency.
Create and verify Google My Business and Bing Places listings.
Build citations on reputable local business directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and industry-specific platforms.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema for the business.
No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information.
No Product or Service schema for specific HVAC services offered.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of online reviews and customer feedback to build trust and authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Portland, Oregon, due to low local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing website content with local keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing expert content, engaging with the community, and leveraging partnerships with local organizations.

page_title: Deluxe Heating & Cooling - Expert HVAC Services for Residential & Commercial Properties
